CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $json.NOME_cliente }}.MC_ad_creatives (
    id bigint PRIMARY KEY,  -- ID único do post
    name TEXT,  -- Nome do post
    account_id bigint NOT NULL,  -- ID da conta associada
    actor_id bigint NOT NULL,  -- ID do ator que publicou
    instagram_user_id bigint,  -- ID do usuário do Instagram
    instagram_permalink_url TEXT,  -- URL do post no Instagram
    effective_instagram_media_id bigint,  -- ID da mídia no Instagram
    call_to_action_type VARCHAR(50),  -- Tipo de call-to-action (ex: LEARN_MORE)
    object_type VARCHAR(50),  -- Tipo do objeto (ex: VIDEO, SHARE)
    status VARCHAR(20),  -- Status do post (ex: ACTIVE)
    thumbnail_url TEXT,  -- URL da thumbnail
    thumbnail_id bigint,  -- ID da thumbnail
    title VARCHAR(500),  -- Título do post
    video_id bigint,  -- ID do vídeo (se for um post de vídeo)
    image_url TEXT,  -- URL da imagem (se for um post de imagem)
    body TEXT NOT NULL  -- Conteúdo do post
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;


CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $json.NOME_cliente }}.MC_ads (
    ad_id BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
    account_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    campaign_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    adset_id BIGINT NOT NULL,
    name VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    preview_shareable_link TEXT,
    creative_id BIGINT NOT NULL,

    issues_error_summary TEXT,

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $json.NOME_cliente }}.MC_ad_accounts (
    act_account_id VARCHAR(50) PRIMARY KEY,         -- ID da conta (chave primária)
    name VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,         -- Nome da conta
    account_id BIGINT NOT NULL,    -- ID da conta (pode ser usado para relacionamentos)
    account_status INT NOT NULL,        -- Status numérico da conta
    account_status_name VARCHAR(50),    -- Nome do status da conta
    age FLOAT,                  -- Idade da conta (com precisão decimal)
    business_name VARCHAR(255),         -- Nome do negócio
    currency VARCHAR(10),               -- Moeda usada na conta
    is_prepay_account varchar(5),          -- Indica se é uma conta pré-paga
    owner VARCHAR(50),                  -- ID do dono da conta
    timezone_name VARCHAR(100),         -- Fuso horário da conta
    amount_spent FLOAT,         -- Quantia gasta (convertido para decimal)
    balance FLOAT,              -- Saldo da conta
    spend_cap FLOAT             -- Limite de gastos
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {{ $json.NOME_cliente }}.MC_custom_conversions (

USE {{ $json.db_name }};
-- DROP VIEW IF EXISTS {{ $json.db_name }}.MC_CTX_{{ $json.db_name }};

CREATE VIEW {{ $json.db_name }}.MC_CTX_{{ $json.db_name }} AS
WITH RECURSIVE
  -- Define os limites dinâmicos com base nos registros existentes
  bounds AS (
    SELECT 
      DATE_SUB(MAX(`date`), INTERVAL 90 DAY) AS start_dt, -- Calcula a data de início (últimos 60 dias) ==MIN(`date`) AS start_dt, 
      MAX(`date`) AS end_dt
    FROM {{ $json.db_name }}.`MC_ads_performance`
  ),
  -- Gera o intervalo de datas a partir dos limites dinâmicos
  date_range AS (
    SELECT start_dt AS dt
    FROM bounds
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATE_ADD(dt, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
    FROM date_range CROSS JOIN bounds
    WHERE dt < bounds.end_dt
  )
SELECT 
  -- Exibe todas as datas geradas
  dr.dt AS `Data`,
  
  -- Dados da Conta de Anúncio
  adc.name AS ad_account_name,                              -- Nome da conta
  adc.account_status AS ad_account_status,                  -- Status numérico da conta
  adc.account_status_name AS ad_account_status_name,        -- Nome do status
  adc.age AS ad_account_age,                                -- Idade da conta
  adc.business_name AS business_manager,                  -- Nome do negócio
  adc.currency AS ad_account_currency,                    -- Moeda usada na conta
  adc.is_prepay_account AS is_prepay_ad_account,          -- Conta pré-paga
  adc.owner AS ad_account_owner,                          -- ID do dono da conta
  adc.timezone_name AS ad_account_timezone_name,          -- Fuso horário
  adc.amount_spent AS ad_account_amount_spent,            -- Quantia gasta
  adc.balance AS ad_account_balance,                      -- Saldo da conta
  adc.spend_cap AS ad_account_spend_cap,                  -- Limite de gastos

  -- Dados das Campanhas
  cp.campaign_name AS campaign_name,                      -- Nome da campanha
  cp.created_time AS campaign_created_time,              -- Data de criação
  cp.start_time AS campaign_start_time,                  -- Início da campanha
  cp.stop_time AS campaign_stop_time,                    -- Término da campanha
  cp.updated_time AS campaign_updated_time,              -- Última atualização
  cp.budget_remaining AS campaign_budget_remaining,      -- Orçamento restante
  cp.daily_budget AS campaign_daily_budget,              -- Orçamento diário
  cp.lifetime_budget AS campaign_lifetime_budget,        -- Orçamento vitalício
  cp.effective_status AS campaign_effective_status,      -- Status da campanha
  cp.pacing_type AS campaign_pacing_type,                -- Tipo de ritmo
  cp.topline_id AS campaign_topline_id,                  -- ID para relatórios
  cp.bid_strategy AS campaign_bid_strategy,              -- Estratégia de lance
  cp.objective AS campaign_objective,                    -- Objetivo da campanha
  cp.primary_attribution AS campaign_primary_attribution,-- Atribuição primária
  cp.special_ad_category AS campaign_special_ad_category, -- Categoria especial

  -- Dados do Conjunto de anúncios
  ast.adset_name AS adset_name,                          -- Nome do conjunto
  ast.created_time AS adset_created_time,                -- Data de criação
  ast.start_time AS adset_start_time,                    -- Início do conjunto
  ast.end_time AS adset_end_time,                        -- Término do conjunto
  ast.billing_event AS adset_billing_event,              -- Evento de cobrança
  ast.budget_remaining AS adset_budget_remaining,        -- Orçamento restante
  ast.daily_budget AS adset_daily_budget,                -- Orçamento diário
  ast.destination_type AS adset_destination_type,        -- Tipo de destino
  ast.is_dynamic_creative AS adset_is_dynamic_creative,  -- Criativo dinâmico
  ast.effective_status AS adset_effective_status,        -- Status efetivo
  ast.optimization_goal AS adset_optimization_goal,      -- Objetivo de otimização
  ast.learning_attribution_windows AS adset_learning_attribution_windows, -- Janelas de atribuição
  ast.learning_conversions AS adset_learning_conversions,-- Conversões
  ast.learning_last_sig_edit_ts AS adset_learning_last_edit, -- Última edição relevante
  ast.learning_status AS adset_learning_status,          -- Status de aprendizado

  -- Dados dos Anúncios
  ad.name AS ad_name,                                    -- Nome do anúncio
  ad.preview_shareable_link AS ad_preview_link,          -- Link de visualização
  ad.issues_level AS ad_issues_error_level,              -- Nível de problemas
  ad.issues_error_code AS ad_issues_error_code,          -- Código de erro
  ad.issues_error_summary AS ad_issues_error_summary,    -- Resumo do erro
  ad.issues_error_message AS ad_issues_error_message,    -- Mensagem de erro
  ad.issues_error_type AS ad_issues_error_type,          -- Tipo de erro
  ad.effective_status AS ad_effective_status,        	 -- Status efetivo

  -- Dados do Ad Creative
  ad.creative_id AS ad_creative_id,                      -- ID do criativo
  ac.name AS ad_creative_name,                           -- Nome do post
  ac.actor_id AS ad_creative_actor_id,                   -- ID do ator
  ac.instagram_user_id AS ad_creative_instagram_user_id, -- ID do Instagram
  ac.instagram_permalink_url AS ad_creative_instagram_permalink_url, -- URL do post
  ac.effective_instagram_media_id AS ad_creative_instagram_media_id,   -- ID da mídia
  ac.call_to_action_type AS ad_creative_call_to_action_type,           -- Tipo de CTA
  ac.object_type AS ad_creative_object_type,             -- Tipo do objeto
  ac.status AS ad_creative_status,                       -- Status do post
  ac.thumbnail_url AS ad_creative_thumbnail_url,         -- URL da thumbnail
  ac.thumbnail_id AS ad_creative_thumbnail_id,           -- ID da thumbnail
  ac.title AS ad_creative_title,                         -- Título do post
  ac.video_id AS ad_creative_video_id,                   -- ID do vídeo
  ac.image_url AS ad_creative_image_url,                 -- URL da imagem
  ac.body AS ad_creative_body,                           -- Conteúdo do post
  
  -- Dados de Performance (se não houver registro, as métricas serão zero)
  ap.*

FROM date_range dr
LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.`MC_ads_performance` AS ap 
       ON ap.date = dr.dt
LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.`MC_ad_accounts` AS adc 
       ON ap.account_id = adc.account_id
LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.`MC_campaigns` AS cp  
       ON ap.account_id = cp.account_id AND ap.campaign_id = cp.campaign_id
LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.`MC_ad_sets` AS ast    
       ON ap.account_id = ast.account_id AND ap.campaign_id = ast.campaign_id AND ap.adset_id = ast.adset_id
LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.`MC_ads` AS ad         
       ON ap.account_id = ad.account_id AND ap.campaign_id = ad.campaign_id 
          AND ap.adset_id = ad.adset_id AND ap.ad_id = ad.ad_id
LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.`MC_ad_creatives` AS ac 
       ON ap.account_id = ac.account_id AND ad.creative_id = ac.id;

CREATE VIEW {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ctx_ls_{{ $json.db_name }}_view AS
 WITH RECURSIVE
  bounds AS (
    SELECT
        '2025-01-01'
            AS start_dt,
        CAST(MAX(mp.`date`) AS DATE) 
            AS end_dt
    FROM {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ads_performance mp
  ),
  date_range AS (
    SELECT b.start_dt AS dt
    FROM bounds b
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATE_ADD(dr.dt, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
    FROM date_range dr
    JOIN bounds b ON dr.dt < b.end_dt
  )
 SELECT
    dr.dt                                  AS Data,
    adc.name                               AS ad_account_name,
    adc.account_status_name                AS ad_account_status_name,
    cp.campaign_name                       AS campaign_name,
    cp.effective_status                    AS campaign_effective_status,
    cp.pacing_type                         AS campaign_pacing_type,
    cp.bid_strategy                        AS campaign_bid_strategy,
    cp.objective                           AS campaign_objective,
    cp.special_ad_category                 AS campaign_special_ad_category,
	
    ast.adset_name                         AS adset_name,
    ast.destination_type                   AS adset_destination_type,
    ast.effective_status                   AS adset_effective_status,
    ast.optimization_goal                  AS adset_optimization_goal,
    ad.name                                AS ad_name,
    ad.preview_shareable_link              AS ad_preview_link,
    ad.issues_level                        AS ad_issues_error_level,
    ad.creative_id                         AS ad_creative_id,
    ad.effective_status                    AS ad_effective_status,
    
    ac.name                                AS ad_creative_name,
    ac.instagram_user_id                   AS ad_creative_instagram_user_id,
    ac.instagram_permalink_url             AS ad_creative_instagram_permalink_url,
    ac.effective_instagram_media_id        AS ad_creative_instagram_media_id,
    ac.call_to_action_type                 AS ad_creative_call_to_action_type,
    ac.object_type                         AS ad_creative_object_type,
    ac.thumbnail_url                       AS ad_creative_thumbnail_url,
    ac.thumbnail_id                        AS ad_creative_thumbnail_id,
    ac.title                               AS ad_creative_title,
    ac.video_id                            AS ad_creative_video_id,
    ac.image_url                           AS ad_creative_image_url,
    ac.body                                AS ad_creative_body,
	
    ap.date                                AS date,
    ap.date_start                          AS date_start,
    ap.date_stop                           AS date_stop,
    ap.account_id                          AS account_id,
    ap.act_account_id                      AS act_account_id,
    ap.campaign_id                         AS campaign_id,
    ap.adset_id                            AS adset_id,
    ap.ad_id                               AS ad_id,
    ap.objective                           AS objective,
    ap.optimization_goal                   AS optimization_goal,
	SUM(ap.spend) AS spend,
	SUM(ap.impressions) AS impressions,
	SUM(ap.clicks_all) AS clicks_all,
	SUM(ap.reach) AS reach,
	SUM(ap.unique_clicks) AS unique_clicks,
	SUM(ap.link_click) AS link_click,
	SUM(ap.landing_page_view) AS landing_page_view,
	SUM(ap.post_engagement) AS post_engagement,
	SUM(ap.post_save) AS post_save,
	SUM(ap.post_reaction) AS post_reaction,
	SUM(ap.post_comment) AS post_comment,
	SUM(ap.post) AS post,
	SUM(ap.post_like) AS post_like,
	SUM(ap.messaging_total) AS messaging_total,
	SUM(ap.messaging_conversation_started_7d) AS messaging_conversation_started_7d,
	SUM(ap.contact) AS contact_all,
	SUM(ap.initiate_checkout) AS initiate_checkout_all,
	SUM(ap.initiate_checkout_value) AS initiate_checkout_value,
	SUM(ap.lead) AS lead_all,
	SUM(ap.purchase) AS purchase_all,
	SUM(ap.purchase_value) AS purchase_value,
	SUM(ap.add_to_cart) AS add_to_cart_all,
	SUM(ap.add_to_cart_value) AS add_to_cart_value,
	SUM(ap.complete_registration) AS complete_registration_all,
	AVG(ap.video_avg_time_watched) AS video_avg_time_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_p25_watched) AS video_p25_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_p50_watched) AS video_p50_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_p75_watched) AS video_p75_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_p95_watched) AS video_p95_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_p100_watched) AS video_p100_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_play) AS video_play,
	SUM(ap.video_2s_watched) AS video_2s_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_3s_watched) AS video_3s_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_10s_watched) AS video_10s_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_15s_watched) AS video_15s_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_30s_watched) AS video_30s_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_60s_watched) AS video_60s_watched

  
FROM
    date_range dr

  LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ads_performance ap
    ON ap.date = dr.dt

  LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ad_accounts adc
    ON ap.account_id = adc.account_id

  LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_campaigns cp
    ON ap.account_id = cp.account_id
   AND ap.campaign_id = cp.campaign_id

  LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ad_sets ast
    ON ap.account_id = ast.account_id
   AND ap.campaign_id = ast.campaign_id
   AND ap.adset_id = ast.adset_id
 LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ads ad
    ON ap.account_id = ad.account_id
   AND ap.campaign_id = ad.campaign_id
   AND ap.adset_id = ad.adset_id
   AND ap.ad_id = ad.ad_id
 LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ad_creatives ac
    ON ap.account_id = ac.account_id
   AND ad.creative_id = ac.id

GROUP BY
    dr.dt,
    adc.name,
    adc.account_status_name,
    cp.campaign_name,
    cp.effective_status,
    cp.pacing_type,
    cp.bid_strategy,
    cp.objective,
    cp.special_ad_category,
    ast.adset_name,
    ast.destination_type,
    ast.effective_status,
    ast.optimization_goal,
    ad.name,
    ad.preview_shareable_link,
    ad.issues_level,
    ad.creative_id,
    ad.effective_status,
    ac.name,
    ac.instagram_user_id,
    ac.instagram_permalink_url,
    ac.effective_instagram_media_id,
    ac.call_to_action_type,
    ac.object_type,
    ac.thumbnail_url,
    ac.thumbnail_id,
    ac.title,
    ac.video_id,
    ac.image_url,
    ac.body,
    ap.date,
    ap.date_start,
    ap.date_stop,
    ap.account_id,
    ap.act_account_id,
    ap.campaign_id,
    ap.adset_id,
    ap.ad_id,
    ap.objective,
    ap.optimization_goal;

-- 1) Totais diários (1 linha por métrica por dia por conta)
CREATE TABLE {{ $json.NOME_cliente }}.ig_insights_daily_metric (
  metric_date DATE NOT NULL,
  ig_user_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,

  metric_name VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,     -- ex: reach, views, likes...
  period ENUM('day') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'day',

  -- o total "do topo"
  total_value BIGINT SIGNED NULL,

  -- metadados úteis
  metric_id VARCHAR(255) NULL,          -- ex: 1784.../insights/reach/day
  title VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  description TEXT NULL,

  raw_json JSON NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

  PRIMARY KEY (ig_user_id, metric_date, metric_name),
  KEY idx_metric_date (metric_date),
  KEY idx_metric_name (metric_name)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

-- 2) Breakdowns (1 linha por dimensão/valor)
CREATE TABLE {{ $json.NOME_cliente }}.ig_insights_daily_breakdown (
  metric_date DATE NOT NULL,
  ig_user_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,

  metric_name VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,      -- ex: reach
  period ENUM('day') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'day',

  dimension_key VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,    -- ex: follow_type, media_product_type
  dimension_value VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,  -- ex: FOLLOWER, REEL, STORY...

  metric_value BIGINT SIGNED NOT NULL,   -- valor daquela fatia

  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

  PRIMARY KEY (ig_user_id, metric_date, metric_name, dimension_key, dimension_value),
  KEY idx_metric_date (metric_date),
  KEY idx_metric_name (metric_name),
  KEY idx_dimension (dimension_key, dimension_value)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

COMMIT;

USE {{ $json.db_name }};
-- DROP VIEW IF EXISTS {{ $json.db_name }}.MC_CTX_{{ $json.db_name }};

CREATE VIEW {{ $json.db_name }}.MC_CTX_{{ $json.db_name }} AS
WITH RECURSIVE
  -- Define os limites dinâmicos com base nos registros existentes
  bounds AS (
    SELECT 
      DATE_SUB(MAX(`date`), INTERVAL 90 DAY) AS start_dt, -- Calcula a data de início (últimos 60 dias) ==MIN(`date`) AS start_dt, 
      MAX(`date`) AS end_dt
    FROM {{ $json.db_name }}.`MC_ads_performance`
  ),
  -- Gera o intervalo de datas a partir dos limites dinâmicos
  date_range AS (
    SELECT start_dt AS dt
    FROM bounds
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATE_ADD(dt, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
    FROM date_range CROSS JOIN bounds
    WHERE dt < bounds.end_dt
  )
SELECT 
  -- Exibe todas as datas geradas
  dr.dt AS `Data`,
  
  -- Dados da Conta de Anúncio
  adc.name AS ad_account_name,                              -- Nome da conta
  adc.account_status AS ad_account_status,                  -- Status numérico da conta
  adc.account_status_name AS ad_account_status_name,        -- Nome do status
  adc.age AS ad_account_age,                                -- Idade da conta
  adc.business_name AS business_manager,                  -- Nome do negócio
  adc.currency AS ad_account_currency,                    -- Moeda usada na conta
  adc.is_prepay_account AS is_prepay_ad_account,          -- Conta pré-paga
  adc.owner AS ad_account_owner,                          -- ID do dono da conta
  adc.timezone_name AS ad_account_timezone_name,          -- Fuso horário
  adc.amount_spent AS ad_account_amount_spent,            -- Quantia gasta
  adc.balance AS ad_account_balance,                      -- Saldo da conta
  adc.spend_cap AS ad_account_spend_cap,                  -- Limite de gastos

  -- Dados das Campanhas
  cp.campaign_name AS campaign_name,                      -- Nome da campanha
  cp.created_time AS campaign_created_time,              -- Data de criação
  cp.start_time AS campaign_start_time,                  -- Início da campanha
  cp.stop_time AS campaign_stop_time,                    -- Término da campanha
  cp.updated_time AS campaign_updated_time,              -- Última atualização
  cp.budget_remaining AS campaign_budget_remaining,      -- Orçamento restante
  cp.daily_budget AS campaign_daily_budget,              -- Orçamento diário
  cp.lifetime_budget AS campaign_lifetime_budget,        -- Orçamento vitalício
  cp.effective_status AS campaign_effective_status,      -- Status da campanha
  cp.pacing_type AS campaign_pacing_type,                -- Tipo de ritmo
  cp.topline_id AS campaign_topline_id,                  -- ID para relatórios
  cp.bid_strategy AS campaign_bid_strategy,              -- Estratégia de lance
  cp.objective AS campaign_objective,                    -- Objetivo da campanha
  cp.primary_attribution AS campaign_primary_attribution,-- Atribuição primária
  cp.special_ad_category AS campaign_special_ad_category, -- Categoria especial

  -- Dados do Conjunto de anúncios
  ast.adset_name AS adset_name,                          -- Nome do conjunto
  ast.created_time AS adset_created_time,                -- Data de criação
  ast.start_time AS adset_start_time,                    -- Início do conjunto
  ast.end_time AS adset_end_time,                        -- Término do conjunto
  ast.billing_event AS adset_billing_event,              -- Evento de cobrança
  ast.budget_remaining AS adset_budget_remaining,        -- Orçamento restante
  ast.daily_budget AS adset_daily_budget,                -- Orçamento diário
  ast.destination_type AS adset_destination_type,        -- Tipo de destino
  ast.is_dynamic_creative AS adset_is_dynamic_creative,  -- Criativo dinâmico
  ast.effective_status AS adset_effective_status,        -- Status efetivo
  ast.optimization_goal AS adset_optimization_goal,      -- Objetivo de otimização
  ast.learning_attribution_windows AS adset_learning_attribution_windows, -- Janelas de atribuição
  ast.learning_conversions AS adset_learning_conversions,-- Conversões
  ast.learning_last_sig_edit_ts AS adset_learning_last_edit, -- Última edição relevante
  ast.learning_status AS adset_learning_status,          -- Status de aprendizado

  -- Dados dos Anúncios
  ad.name AS ad_name,                                    -- Nome do anúncio
  ad.preview_shareable_link AS ad_preview_link,          -- Link de visualização
  ad.issues_level AS ad_issues_error_level,              -- Nível de problemas
  ad.issues_error_code AS ad_issues_error_code,          -- Código de erro
  ad.issues_error_summary AS ad_issues_error_summary,    -- Resumo do erro
  ad.issues_error_message AS ad_issues_error_message,    -- Mensagem de erro
  ad.issues_error_type AS ad_issues_error_type,          -- Tipo de erro
  ad.effective_status AS ad_effective_status,        	 -- Status efetivo

  -- Dados do Ad Creative
  ad.creative_id AS ad_creative_id,                      -- ID do criativo
  ac.name AS ad_creative_name,                           -- Nome do post
  ac.actor_id AS ad_creative_actor_id,                   -- ID do ator
  ac.instagram_user_id AS ad_creative_instagram_user_id, -- ID do Instagram
  ac.instagram_permalink_url AS ad_creative_instagram_permalink_url, -- URL do post
  ac.effective_instagram_media_id AS ad_creative_instagram_media_id,   -- ID da mídia
  ac.call_to_action_type AS ad_creative_call_to_action_type,           -- Tipo de CTA
  ac.object_type AS ad_creative_object_type,             -- Tipo do objeto
  ac.status AS ad_creative_status,                       -- Status do post
  ac.thumbnail_url AS ad_creative_thumbnail_url,         -- URL da thumbnail
  ac.thumbnail_id AS ad_creative_thumbnail_id,           -- ID da thumbnail
  ac.title AS ad_creative_title,                         -- Título do post
  ac.video_id AS ad_creative_video_id,                   -- ID do vídeo
  ac.image_url AS ad_creative_image_url,                 -- URL da imagem
  ac.body AS ad_creative_body,                           -- Conteúdo do post
  
  -- Dados de Performance (se não houver registro, as métricas serão zero)
  ap.*

FROM date_range dr
LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.`MC_ads_performance` AS ap 
       ON ap.date = dr.dt
LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.`MC_ad_accounts` AS adc 
       ON ap.account_id = adc.account_id
LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.`MC_campaigns` AS cp  
       ON ap.account_id = cp.account_id AND ap.campaign_id = cp.campaign_id
LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.`MC_ad_sets` AS ast    
       ON ap.account_id = ast.account_id AND ap.campaign_id = ast.campaign_id AND ap.adset_id = ast.adset_id
LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.`MC_ads` AS ad         
       ON ap.account_id = ad.account_id AND ap.campaign_id = ad.campaign_id 
          AND ap.adset_id = ad.adset_id AND ap.ad_id = ad.ad_id
LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.`MC_ad_creatives` AS ac 
       ON ap.account_id = ac.account_id AND ad.creative_id = ac.id;

CREATE VIEW {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ctx_ls_{{ $json.db_name }}_view AS
 WITH RECURSIVE
  bounds AS (
    SELECT
        '2025-01-01'
            AS start_dt,
        CAST(MAX(mp.`date`) AS DATE) 
            AS end_dt
    FROM {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ads_performance mp
  ),
  date_range AS (
    SELECT b.start_dt AS dt
    FROM bounds b
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATE_ADD(dr.dt, INTERVAL 1 DAY)
    FROM date_range dr
    JOIN bounds b ON dr.dt < b.end_dt
  )
 SELECT
    dr.dt                                  AS Data,
    adc.name                               AS ad_account_name,
    adc.account_status_name                AS ad_account_status_name,
    cp.campaign_name                       AS campaign_name,
    cp.effective_status                    AS campaign_effective_status,
    cp.pacing_type                         AS campaign_pacing_type,
    cp.bid_strategy                        AS campaign_bid_strategy,
    cp.objective                           AS campaign_objective,
    cp.special_ad_category                 AS campaign_special_ad_category,
	
    ast.adset_name                         AS adset_name,
    ast.destination_type                   AS adset_destination_type,
    ast.effective_status                   AS adset_effective_status,
    ast.optimization_goal                  AS adset_optimization_goal,
    ad.name                                AS ad_name,
    ad.preview_shareable_link              AS ad_preview_link,
    ad.issues_level                        AS ad_issues_error_level,
    ad.creative_id                         AS ad_creative_id,
    ad.effective_status                    AS ad_effective_status,
    
    ac.name                                AS ad_creative_name,
    ac.instagram_user_id                   AS ad_creative_instagram_user_id,
    ac.instagram_permalink_url             AS ad_creative_instagram_permalink_url,
    ac.effective_instagram_media_id        AS ad_creative_instagram_media_id,
    ac.call_to_action_type                 AS ad_creative_call_to_action_type,
    ac.object_type                         AS ad_creative_object_type,
    ac.thumbnail_url                       AS ad_creative_thumbnail_url,
    ac.thumbnail_id                        AS ad_creative_thumbnail_id,
    ac.title                               AS ad_creative_title,
    ac.video_id                            AS ad_creative_video_id,
    ac.image_url                           AS ad_creative_image_url,
    ac.body                                AS ad_creative_body,
	
    ap.date                                AS date,
    ap.date_start                          AS date_start,
    ap.date_stop                           AS date_stop,
    ap.account_id                          AS account_id,
    ap.act_account_id                      AS act_account_id,
    ap.campaign_id                         AS campaign_id,
    ap.adset_id                            AS adset_id,
    ap.ad_id                               AS ad_id,
    ap.objective                           AS objective,
    ap.optimization_goal                   AS optimization_goal,
	SUM(ap.spend) AS spend,
	SUM(ap.impressions) AS impressions,
	SUM(ap.clicks_all) AS clicks_all,
	SUM(ap.reach) AS reach,
	SUM(ap.unique_clicks) AS unique_clicks,
	SUM(ap.link_click) AS link_click,
	SUM(ap.landing_page_view) AS landing_page_view,
	SUM(ap.post_engagement) AS post_engagement,
	SUM(ap.post_save) AS post_save,
	SUM(ap.post_reaction) AS post_reaction,
	SUM(ap.post_comment) AS post_comment,
	SUM(ap.post) AS post,
	SUM(ap.post_like) AS post_like,
	SUM(ap.messaging_total) AS messaging_total,
	SUM(ap.messaging_conversation_started_7d) AS messaging_conversation_started_7d,
	SUM(ap.contact) AS contact_all,
	SUM(ap.initiate_checkout) AS initiate_checkout_all,
	SUM(ap.initiate_checkout_value) AS initiate_checkout_value,
	SUM(ap.lead) AS lead_all,
	SUM(ap.purchase) AS purchase_all,
	SUM(ap.purchase_value) AS purchase_value,
	SUM(ap.add_to_cart) AS add_to_cart_all,
	SUM(ap.add_to_cart_value) AS add_to_cart_value,
	SUM(ap.complete_registration) AS complete_registration_all,
	AVG(ap.video_avg_time_watched) AS video_avg_time_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_p25_watched) AS video_p25_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_p50_watched) AS video_p50_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_p75_watched) AS video_p75_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_p95_watched) AS video_p95_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_p100_watched) AS video_p100_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_play) AS video_play,
	SUM(ap.video_2s_watched) AS video_2s_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_3s_watched) AS video_3s_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_10s_watched) AS video_10s_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_15s_watched) AS video_15s_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_30s_watched) AS video_30s_watched,
	SUM(ap.video_60s_watched) AS video_60s_watched

  
FROM
    date_range dr

  LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ads_performance ap
    ON ap.date = dr.dt

  LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ad_accounts adc
    ON ap.account_id = adc.account_id

  LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_campaigns cp
    ON ap.account_id = cp.account_id
   AND ap.campaign_id = cp.campaign_id

  LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ad_sets ast
    ON ap.account_id = ast.account_id
   AND ap.campaign_id = ast.campaign_id
   AND ap.adset_id = ast.adset_id
 LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ads ad
    ON ap.account_id = ad.account_id
   AND ap.campaign_id = ad.campaign_id
   AND ap.adset_id = ad.adset_id
   AND ap.ad_id = ad.ad_id
 LEFT JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ad_creatives ac
    ON ap.account_id = ac.account_id
   AND ad.creative_id = ac.id

GROUP BY
    dr.dt,
    adc.name,
    adc.account_status_name,
    cp.campaign_name,
    cp.effective_status,
    cp.pacing_type,
    cp.bid_strategy,
    cp.objective,
    cp.special_ad_category,
    ast.adset_name,
    ast.destination_type,
    ast.effective_status,
    ast.optimization_goal,
    ad.name,
    ad.preview_shareable_link,
    ad.issues_level,
    ad.creative_id,
    ad.effective_status,
    ac.name,
    ac.instagram_user_id,
    ac.instagram_permalink_url,
    ac.effective_instagram_media_id,
    ac.call_to_action_type,
    ac.object_type,
    ac.thumbnail_url,
    ac.thumbnail_id,
    ac.title,
    ac.video_id,
    ac.image_url,
    ac.body,
    ap.date,
    ap.date_start,
    ap.date_stop,
    ap.account_id,
    ap.act_account_id,
    ap.campaign_id,
    ap.adset_id,
    ap.ad_id,
    ap.objective,
    ap.optimization_goal;

-- 1) Totais diários (1 linha por métrica por dia por conta)
CREATE TABLE {{ $json.NOME_cliente }}.ig_insights_daily_metric (
  metric_date DATE NOT NULL,
  ig_user_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,

  metric_name VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,     -- ex: reach, views, likes...
  period ENUM('day') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'day',

  -- o total "do topo"
  total_value BIGINT SIGNED NULL,

  -- metadados úteis
  metric_id VARCHAR(255) NULL,          -- ex: 1784.../insights/reach/day
  title VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  description TEXT NULL,

  raw_json JSON NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

  PRIMARY KEY (ig_user_id, metric_date, metric_name),
  KEY idx_metric_date (metric_date),
  KEY idx_metric_name (metric_name)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

-- 2) Breakdowns (1 linha por dimensão/valor)
CREATE TABLE {{ $json.NOME_cliente }}.ig_insights_daily_breakdown (
  metric_date DATE NOT NULL,
  ig_user_id BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,

  metric_name VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,      -- ex: reach
  period ENUM('day') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'day',

  dimension_key VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,    -- ex: follow_type, media_product_type
  dimension_value VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,  -- ex: FOLLOWER, REEL, STORY...

  metric_value BIGINT SIGNED NOT NULL,   -- valor daquela fatia

  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,

  PRIMARY KEY (ig_user_id, metric_date, metric_name, dimension_key, dimension_value),
  KEY idx_metric_date (metric_date),
  KEY idx_metric_name (metric_name),
  KEY idx_dimension (dimension_key, dimension_value)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

COMMIT;
